label: fix5_1of10

basis: Phase 2 instant and buildup transport verified: 38/38 SIM headers point to fix5 geometry and no baseline geometry.
Raw and ground-state normalization audits pass with gamma division 12 and non-gamma division 1.
Ground-state/NUBASE audit passes with zero NUBASE line mismatches and fix5 fixed-source geometry.

Exact-position source audit passes M=5000 source-level thresholds: manifest flux delta 0, source text relative delta < 1e-6, matched fraction 1.0, ambiguous coordinate fraction 0, missed activity fraction <= 0.01.
Verifier verdict records delayed source-level PASS but no delayed rate claim.

gate_constraints_after_transport: Delayed SIM header must be verified to contain the fix5 .geo.setup before any Step05 use.
Delayed transport TE/SE/ID/TS must be summarized from the SIM output.
W/collimator source-level activity is not a selected delayed rate; selected W/collimator impact remains pending Step05 breakdown.
Old new_geo_re numbers remain historical context only while benchmark_alignment decision is NOT_ALIGNED.
